summary: Updated meta-knowledge-index.json with new learning update record for security-veto SHA-512 migration.
description: The meta-knowledge index synthesizes all learning updates and AGENTS.md files across the OpenCode ecosystem. After adding the security-veto SHA-512 migration learning update, the meta-knowledge index was automatically regenerated by the learning-gate hook to include the new record and maintain index integrity.

changes.modification: Added new security-veto SHA-512 migration learning record and updated timestamp
changes.details: The meta-knowledge index was regenerated by post-commit learning-gate hook to include the new learning update record, updating total_records from 394 to 395 and adding the record to reliability category.
